name: lightbox
description: Adds Run and Debug buttons to the editor title bar that launch shell scripts in a floating terminal window.

lightbox.run.description: Run button: a command string, or an object {script, cwd, args, floatingWindow}.

script.description: Shell command or path to a .sh script.

args.description: Optional arguments appended to the script.

floatingWindow.description: If true, move the terminal into a separate window after launching.

autoClose.description: If true, dispose the terminal (and close its floating window) when the command finishes.

lightbox.debug.description: Debug button: a command string, or an object {script, cwd, args, floatingWindow}.

script.description: Shell command or path to a .sh script.

args.description: Optional arguments appended to the script.

floatingWindow.description: If true, move the terminal into a separate window after launching.

autoClose.description: If true, dispose the terminal (and close its floating window) when the command finishes.
